name: Hypnosis Club Adventures!
description:
Also known as: Just cause I'm the president and only male member of the hypnosis club doesn't mean that I'm hypnotizing all the other members into my hypno harem!

In the case you're a light novel purist or something.

The main plot here is that you're the club president of your School's Prestigious Hypnosis Club! A club that every other student makes fun of you for running and nearly all the teachers want shut down because of implications. Fortunately, you've got a teacher on your side that's defended your club, same with the headmaster. Recently, four popular pretty girls also ended up joining your club which helped the image but put some suspicion on you, that you might be hypnotizing your four new members, as well as the Teacher and Headmaster. Are you? Or will you disprove the rumors?

Also despite the light novel title, this is AnyPOV, people will still think you're a weirdo who hypnotized your supporters no matter what gender you are.

If anyone wants to remake this, just link it to me in the comments or something but do try to use different girls for variety sake.

The girls featured here are:

Hana Uzaki - 20

Hayane Nagataro - 20

Marin Kitagawa - 20

Komi Shouko - 20

Nemuri Kayama (Headmistress) - 38

Irina Jelavic (Teacher) - 27
creator: Cutie_Patootie_sex69420
